title: How 11 herbal teas can assist elderly with low blood pressure
description: Ephedra sinica teas have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to help increase blood pressure in people with low blood pressure. This is because the tea contains a compound called ephedrine, which is a stimulant that helps to increase the heart rate and dilate blood vessels.
